title: Beyond chromatin accessibility: bulk ATAC-seq as an integrative assay to portray genomes and epigenomes.
snippet: Assay for transposase-accessible chromatin using sequencing (ATAC-seq) is a cornerstone for epigenomic profiling, yet its potential for genomic characterization remains poorly explored. Here, we systematically benchmarked bulk ATAC-seq against whole-genome sequencing (WGS) to assess its capacity for detecting small variants, copy number variations (CNVs), t...
